scale.1: Unusable - Translation is wrong or incomprehensible
scale.2: Major mistake - Significant errors that change meaning
scale.3: Acceptable - Understandable but with noticeable errors
scale.4: Good - Minor issues only, overall correct
scale.5: Flawless - No errors detected, natural language
